meta.title: Borderless Studio — Websites Without Borders | AI-Powered Agency
meta.desc: We build fast, beautiful, multilingual websites for businesses that think across borders. NL · PL · EN. Based in Limburg, working worldwide.

hero.title: Your digital presence, without limits.
hero.desc: We build fast, AI-powered websites. Multilingual by default. Launched in days, not weeks. For businesses that think across borders.
hero.secondary: Or scroll down — we've got more

websites.title: Websites
websites.desc: Lightning-fast, multilingual landing pages and business sites. Pure HTML/CSS — no bloated CMS. SEO-ready, GDPR-proof. From €950.

marketing.title: Digital Marketing
marketing.desc: Google Business Profile, local SEO, social media setup. We make sure people actually find the beautiful site we built. From €300/mo.

automation.title: Automation
automation.desc: Custom scripts, cron jobs, data pipelines. If it's repetitive, we automate it. From €500.

case1.title: Lief Schoon
case1.desc: 3-language landing page for a cleaning business in Heerlen. SEO, cookie consent, contact form, GDPR-ready. Built in 2 days.

case2.title: Car Flipping Engine
case2.desc: Automated car market scanner with price analysis, Telegram alerts, and profit calculation. Runs 24/7 on cron.

case3.title: Paper Trading Bot
case3.desc: Automated paper trading system with performance tracking and Telegram integration. Real-time market data processing.

website.title: Website
website.desc: One-time. Multilingual landing page or business site. 3-5 day delivery. SEO, GDPR, cookie consent included.

growth.title: Growth
growth.desc: Monthly. Marketing, SEO, and content. We keep your online presence alive while you run your business.

custom.title: Custom
custom.desc: Automation, integrations, complex projects. We'll scope it and quote it. No obligations.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: No sales pitch. Just tell us what you need.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Got it! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Try emailing us directly at hello@borderless.studio.

cookie.text: This site uses only functional cookies. No tracking, no ads.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: GDPR / AVG Statement
privacy.intro: Borderless Studio values your privacy. Here's how we handle your data.

what.title: What we collect
what.desc: Through our contact form: name, email, and your message. That's it.

purpose.title: Why we collect it
purpose.desc: Solely to respond to your inquiry. Your data is never used for marketing without consent.

sharing.title: Third parties
sharing.desc: None. Your data stays with us. No selling, no sharing, no renting.

storage.title: Storage
storage.desc: Your message is stored in our business mailbox and deleted when no longer needed.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.desc: View, modify, or delete your data anytime. Email hello@borderless.studio — we reply within 30 days.
